title: Better 3D Mace
description: Adds a 3D model to the mace.
body:
I didnt like how the mace looked as a 2D texture and thought it would look a lot better if it was a 3D model so, i decided to make it myself.

# **PREVIEW**

![Mace Model Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a866803945de90e8be43ff0ee1418ad465c0c7af.png)
